name: Neural Nomad #16: Ember — Spark
description: Some moments arrive with such precision they split time into before and after. This is the sound of a match head dragging across rough surface, the millisecond between friction and flame.
threshold_note: The last breath taken as one person, the first taken as another.
collector_meaning: You hold the instant when everything shifts—not the story of it, but the sensation itself. The weight of potential energy converting to kinetic.
